claim_contract.description: Claims that require an explicit anchor-mode evidence contract.

burden_of_proof: boundary: edit claim.text to the licensed_claim and resubmit before ACCEPT
dialectic.licensed_thesis: local plausibility only; universal physical correctness is not licensed
rebuttals: local checks pass, but the universal anchor fails
dialectic.thesis: Local monotonicity proves the generated scaling result is physically correct.
dialectic.warrant: local checks pass, but the universal anchor fails

lattice.non_claim: This lattice orders admissibility of supplied evidence, not scientific truth.

next_action.label: Replace claim.text with the licensed weaker claim and resubmit.

proof_obligations: boundary: edit claim.text to the licensed_claim and resubmit before ACCEPT

fine_tune_blockers: claim.text semantic alignment is not externally certified
witness independence is not externally certified
external review hash is missing or does not match review_packet
source URLs are not recoverable with matching hashes
witness_id is not resolvable in the witness registry
RO-Crate provenance packet is missing, invalid, or hash-mismatched
reviewer identity or attestation is not verifiable

input_claim.text: Local monotonicity proves the generated scaling result is physically correct.

invariant_audit.summary: no domain invariant applies to this evidence

licensed_claim: local plausibility only; universal physical correctness is not licensed
non_claim: This decision is rule-based over supplied evidence fields, not an LLM judgment.
reason: local checks pass, but the universal anchor fails
rewrite: local plausibility only; universal physical correctness is not licensed
